steps.title: Recognize the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the 2020 population. This means the answer must directly include the 2020 population figure.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choice
steps.content: Choice D directly states it: “In 2020, the municipality of Acaxochitlán had a population of 46,065.” The other three either skip the population data, cite the wrong year, or focus on unrelated information. This matches choice D — D is correct.
